g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the scheduled trigger work?')
sendPrompt('What does manually triggering the pipeline look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the council topic selection session work?')
sendPrompt('What does approving the council\'s topic look like?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through how Clark researches a topic end to end')
sendPrompt('What does reviewing Clark\'s report look like?')
sendPrompt('How does Kelly use Aiden and Lexa\'s voices when writing threads?')
sendPrompt('What does approving Kelly\'s thread look like in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does the manual X posting step work?')

svg.text: Atlas · Supabase — all agents read and write through here
